ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "artist_ids" TEXT /* List of artist IDs associated with the track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number in the album */,
  "disc_number" INTEGER /* Disc number in the album */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in BPM */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the track was released */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "top200" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track is in the top 200 */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the track */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "isrc_code" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code */,
  "license_info" TEXT /* Licensing information for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_ids FOREIGN KEY ("artist_ids") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "artist_ids" TEXT /* List of artist IDs associated with the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album cover art */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "producer_ids" TEXT /* List of producer IDs involved in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_ids FOREIGN KEY ("artist_ids") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "debut_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist debuted */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., listener, artist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last active date of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "track_ids" TEXT /* List of track IDs included in the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the playlist */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the playlist */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is public or private */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the playlist cover art */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., play, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the track was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Optional review provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_ratings_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature set */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track associated with these features */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Average loudness of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in BPM */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major or minor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
